name: my-next-breath
description: Jeremy Renner's 'My Next Breath: A Memoir' — the raw, unflinching story of the January 1, 2023 snowcat accident that nearly killed him, and his extraordinary recovery. From the leap to save his nephew Alex, through 38+ broken bones and multiple surgeries, to his philosophy of action over hesitation, family above all, and finding meaning through service.
useCase: Understanding the Renner snowcat accident, learning about post-accident recovery and resilience, exploring Renner's philosophy of action and family, and finding inspiration in his journey back from near-death.
knownRisks: Graphic descriptions of traumatic injury and recovery
Some storytelling is nonlinear and can be confusing
Heavy focus on family dynamics that may not resonate universally
